summary: A health insurance plan designed for senior citizens aged 61 and above with no upper age limit, offering premium based on city of residence, cumulative bonus, unlimited automatic recharge, and wellness benefits with up to 30% renewal discount.
coverage: In-Patient Care up to Sum Insured
Day Care Treatment up to Sum Insured
Post Hospitalization Medical Expenses for 180 Days
AYUSH Treatment up to Sum Insured
Domiciliary Hospitalization up to Sum Insured
Organ Donor Cover up to Sum Insured
Road Ambulance Cover up to Rs.10,000 per year (up to SI for SI>=15L)
Advance Technology Methods up to Sum Insured
Annual Health Check-up once per year for all insured members
Palliative Care up to Rs.5000 per day, max 1L in policy year
Home Modification up to Rs.10,000 in policy year
waiting_periods: Initial Waiting Period: 30 Days for all Hospitalization except Accidental Hospitalization
room_rent: Most Economical Single Private AC Room
Room rent eligibility can be modified using Room Rent Modification optional benefit
co_pay: Co-payment can be introduced using Co-payment optional benefit
Care OPD: 10% Co-payment on GP consultation claims
Care OPD: 5% Co-payment on specialist consultation claims
claims_information: Unlimited Automatic Recharge available for unlimited times for unrelated or same illness
Recharge amount available from 2nd claim in policy year
Recharge amount equal to policy Sum Insured
Max amount from recharge in single claim will not exceed policy Sum Insured
Recharge can be utilized for same person same disease, same person different disease, different person same disease
exclusions: Customers managing Diabetes with Insulin are not eligible for the plan

faqs.question: What is the minimum entry age for this policy?
faqs.answer: Minimum entry age is 61 years for individual and floater policies. For floater, the second member can be less than 60 years.

faqs.question: Is there a maximum entry age limit?
faqs.answer: No, there is no upper age limit for adults. For children, the maximum entry age is 24 years.

faqs.question: What is the exit age for this policy?
faqs.answer: Adults can continue lifelong, while children can stay covered until age 25.

faqs.question: What are the Sum Insured options available?
faqs.answer: Sum Insured options are 7L, 10L, 15L, and 25L for both Care Supreme-Senior Super and Care Supreme-Senior Premium variants.

faqs.question: What is the tenure option for this policy?
faqs.answer: Tenure options are 1, 2, or 3 years.

faqs.question: How is the premium determined?
faqs.answer: Premium is determined based on the city of residence, with Zone 1 and Zone 2 pricing.

faqs.question: Which cities fall under Zone 1 pricing?
faqs.answer: Zone 1 includes Delhi NCR, Mumbai Metropolis Area, Gujarat State, Aligarh, and Mathura.

faqs.question: What is the Cumulative Bonus benefit?
faqs.answer: Cumulative Bonus increases coverage by 50% of Sum Insured per year, with maximum increase restricted to 100% of Sum Insured in 2 consecutive renewals. Claims do not affect the bonus accrued.

faqs.question: How does the Unlimited Automatic Recharge work?
faqs.answer: The policy can be recharged unlimited times in a policy year. Recharge amount becomes available from the 2nd claim and equals the policy Sum Insured.

faqs.question: What is the waiting period for accidental hospitalization?
faqs.answer: There is no waiting period for accidental hospitalization. The 30-day initial waiting period applies to all other hospitalizations.

faqs.question: What family members can be covered under this policy?
faqs.answer: Self, spouse/live-in partner/same sex partner, son, daughter, father, mother, mother-in-law, father-in-law, grandfather, and grandmother can be covered.

faqs.question: What is the maximum number of people that can be covered?
faqs.answer: Individual cover can include maximum 6 persons, while floater cover can include maximum 2 adults and 2 children.

faqs.question: What is the pre-hospitalization coverage period?
faqs.answer: Pre-hospitalization medical expenses are covered for 60 days.

faqs.question: What is the post-hospitalization coverage period?
faqs.answer: Post-hospitalization medical expenses are covered for 180 days.

faqs.question: Is AYUSH treatment covered?
faqs.answer: Yes, AYUSH treatment is covered up to the Sum Insured amount.

faqs.question: What is the ambulance coverage?
faqs.answer: Road ambulance is covered up to Rs.10,000 per year, or up to Sum Insured for SI>=15L. Air ambulance is covered up to 5L as an optional benefit.

faqs.question: Are there any sub-limits in the Care Supreme-Senior Premium variant?
faqs.answer: No, sub-limits are not applicable in the Care Supreme-Senior Premium variant.

faqs.question: What sub-limits apply in the Care Supreme-Senior Super variant?
faqs.answer: Sub-limits apply for cataract, knee replacement, cardiovascular diseases, cancer, renal diseases, hernia surgeries, hysterectomy, and other specified treatments with varying limits based on Sum Insured amount.

faqs.question: How can I get wellness benefits?
faqs.answer: Wellness benefits provide up to 30% discount on renewal premium based on accumulated healthy days (10,000 steps = 1 healthy day) in the first 10 months of the policy year.

faqs.question: What discount can I get with 270 healthy days?
faqs.answer: With 270 healthy days in a year, you can get 30% renewal discount.

faqs.question: Is domiciliary hospitalization covered?
faqs.answer: Yes, domiciliary hospitalization is covered up to the Sum Insured amount.

faqs.question: What is the organ donor cover?
faqs.answer: Organ donor cover is provided up to the Sum Insured amount.

faqs.question: Are e-consultations available?
faqs.answer: Yes, unlimited e-consultations with General Physicians are available.

faqs.question: What additional health services are provided?
faqs.answer: Discount Connect provides discounts on services such as consultations and diagnostics through the network available in the mobile app.

faqs.question: Is annual health check-up included?
faqs.answer: Yes, annual health check-up is provided once per year for all insured members.

faqs.question: What is palliative care coverage?
faqs.answer: Palliative care is available on diagnosis of terminal illness, up to Rs.5000 per day with maximum 1L in a policy year.

faqs.question: What is home modification benefit?
faqs.answer: Home modification up to Rs.10,000 in a policy year is provided within 30 days from discharge date for mobility or movement within residence.

faqs.question: Is there a disease management program?
faqs.answer: Yes, disease management programs are available for diabetic customers or customers diagnosed with hyperlipidemia, including doctor consultations, prescribed pharmacy benefits, and diagnostic tests.

faqs.question: What is Care OPD benefit?
faqs.answer: Care OPD provides 4 GP consultations (max Rs.1000 each), 4 specialist consultations (max Rs.2000 each), physiotherapy OPD up to Rs.1000 per year, and psychologist consultation up to Rs.1000 per year.

faqs.question: Who is not eligible for this plan?
faqs.answer: Customers managing Diabetes with Insulin are not eligible for this plan.
